prisIntro.title: What is PRIS?
prisIntro.intro: PRIS, or the Pharmacy Research and Innovation Summit, is a national pharmacy and innovation academic conference organized to unite pharmacists from all fields academia, hospitals, community pharmacy, marketing, and the industrial sector. It focuses on the exchange of knowledge in research and pharmaceutical innovation, with the goal of Pharmacy research & innovation driving sustainable healthcare to keep pace with the changes in the modern healthcare world.

research.title: Research
research.desc: Showcasing current studies, academic work, and evidence that strengthen the profession.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Highlighting fresh ideas, digital tools, and practical solutions for modern pharmacy.

connection.title: Connection
connection.desc: Creating space for pharmacists, students, educators, and partners to collaborate.

highlightVideo.title: Recent Memories
highlightVideo.subtitle: Relive the highlights from the Pharmaceutical Research and Innovation Symposium 2025

recentMemories.title: Recent Memories
recentMemories.subtitle: Glimpses into the vibrant community and monumental achievements from the previous Pharmaceutical Research and Innovation Symposium.

sponsors.title: Our Sponsors
sponsors.subtitle: Supported by leaders in pharmaceutical research and healthcare innovation.

registrationCTA.description:
A pivotal opportunity to connect with pharmaceutical innovations and a nationwide network of professionals.
Experience the future of pharmacy.
registrationCTA.descEarly: Secure your pass early to guarantee access at the absolute best rate. This is the optimal time to confirm your attendance.
registrationCTA.descRegular: Standard registration window. Rates increase to full price during this period.
registrationCTA.descClosed: Final registration phase leading up to the event. Passes available at late registration rates.
registrationCTA.feature1Desc: Engage in deep discussions and collaborative sessions to shape the future of pharmacy policies and sustainable healthcare practices.
registrationCTA.feature2Desc: Experience the latest pharmaceutical innovations and medical devices from over 60 leading companies. Stay ahead of future trends.
registrationCTA.paymentDesc: Payment for online registration can be made via credit card and QR code scanning.
confirmItems: An automatic confirmation email will be sent to you upon the completion of your registration.
Registrants can check the status of their registration and payment on 'Profile' by logging into the online registration system.
Official receipt from the online registration system will be sent to your email once your payment is completed.
Please note that the receipt will be available after your payment is completed.
cancelItems: To cancel your registration and request for a refund, please download the below cancellation request form, fill it out, and send it to the secretariat via email before the deadline.
Refunds will be made according to the following cancellation & refund policy.
registrationCTA.paymentNote: We accept Credit Card and PromptPay / QR Code
registrationCTA.finePrintTerms: * Cancellation Policy: 75% refund before 31 July 2026, 40% before 31 August 2026, and no refund after 31 August 2026. Automatic confirmation and official receipt will be sent via email upon successful payment.

about.title: About
about.whatIsDesc: PRIS, or the Pharmacy Research and Innovation Summit, is a national pharmacy and innovation academic conference organized to unite pharmacists from all fields academia, hospitals, community pharmacy, marketing, and the industrial sector. It focuses on the exchange of knowledge in research and pharmaceutical innovation, with the goal of Pharmacy research & innovation driving sustainable healthcare to keep pace with the changes in the modern healthcare world.
about.subcommittees: Evaluation and Award Committee for PRIS 2026

cfa.ctaDesc: Join us in shaping the future of pharmacy. Submit your abstract today and be part of the most influential symposium of 2026.

welcomeMessages.desc: Hear from our esteemed leadership as they share their vision and officially welcome you to the PRIS 2026 summit.

abstractGuidelines.desc: Essential information, formatting rules, and detailed structure for submitting your research abstract.
abstractGuidelines.ctaDesc: After reviewing these guidelines thoroughly, you can proceed to the submission portal.

abstractStatus.desc: Track and manage your abstract submissions for PRIS 2026.

abstractSubmission.desc: Please ensure your abstract adheres strictly to the PRIS 2026 formatting guidelines. Submissions exceeding 300 words will not be accepted.
abstractSubmission.successDesc:
Submission complete.
Please wait for approval via Email.
abstractSubmission.successDescEn: Please wait for approval via Email.

step1.subtitle: The primary voice of your research.

step2.subtitle: Include all contributors who made this possible.

step3.subtitle: The identity and core focus of your work.

step4.subtitle: Structure your abstract and provide the documentation.

registrationPolicies.intro: Please review the following policies carefully before registering for PRIS 2026. All cancellation requests must be submitted in writing to

paymentMethod.title: Payment Method
paymentMethod.text1: Payment for online registration is only possible by credit card.
paymentMethod.text2: Once you have filled out all the required information for your registration, please click the "payment" button where a pop-up payment page will appear. Please complete all required information.

confirmation.title: Confirmation of Registration
items: An automatic confirmation email will be sent to you upon the completion of your registration.
Registrants can check the status of their registration and payment on 'Profile' by logging into the online registration system.
Official receipt from the online registration system will be send to your email once your payment is completed.
Please note that the receipt will be available after your payment is completed.

cancellation.title: Cancellations & Refund Policy
items: To cancel your registration and request for a refund, please download the below cancellation request form, fill it out, and send it to the secretariat via email before the deadline.
Refunds will be made according to the following cancellation & refund policy.

sponsorship.intro: PRIS 2026 is made possible through the generous support of our sponsors and partners. We gratefully acknowledge their contribution to the advancement of pharmacy research and innovation.

cta.title: Become a Sponsor
cta.desc: Showcase your brand to leaders in pharmacy research and innovation. Contact us to learn about available sponsorship packages.

auth.loginDesc: Enter your email and password to access your account
auth.selectProfile: Select your academic or professional profile
auth.loginSideText: 29 – 30 October 2026 IMPACT Challenger, Muang Thong Thani
auth.signupSideText: Create an account to securely access submissions, schedules, and personalized conference experiences.
auth.accountPendingDesc: Your account is currently under review by our admin team. You will receive an email notification once your account has been approved.
auth.accountRejectedDesc: Your account registration has been rejected by the admin team.
auth.contactSupport: If you believe this is an error, please contact our support team.
auth.uploadIdDesc: Upload your student ID card or an official university certificate.
auth.uploadLicenseDesc: Upload a copy of your valid Pharmacy Council license.
auth.uploadCertDesc: Upload your professional certificate or official ID card.
auth.receivedDetails: We have received your registration details. Our team will review your information, which typically takes 5-7 business days.
auth.notifyEmail: You will receive an email notification once your account has been approved.
auth.fillDetails: Please fill in your details to register your account
auth.selectDoc: Select student certificate or related document
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSentDesc: If an account exists for this email, we've sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your new password below to regain access to your account.
auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.invalidTokenDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.missingToken: No reset token provided. Please use the link from your email.
